description: Sanctioned walk-on (Marra the Innkeeper) listed in allowedNewEntities. Prose introduces her by name. Expected: PASS — checker must not flag a planner-sanctioned new entity as ungrounded.

task.prose: Kael ducked through the low doorway of the Broken Anchor and found the innkeeper already watching him from behind the bar. Marra the Innkeeper was a broad-shouldered woman with ink-stained fingers and the kind of eyes that catalogued debts. She slid a mug across the counter without being asked. "You look like someone who lost a bet," she said. He caught the mug and said nothing.

writer_request_meta.beatDescription: Kael arrives at the Broken Anchor and meets the innkeeper, a sanctioned new character authorized by the planner.

gold.notes: Marra the Innkeeper is listed in allowed_new_entities. The checker must treat her as grounded for this beat and not flag her as an unsanctioned new entity.

description: Prose introduces Veyl the Deepforger who is NOT in allowedNewEntities and not in any other grounded source. Expected: FAIL — this is a true hallucination.

task.prose: Kael arrived at the Broken Anchor and found Marra the Innkeeper behind the bar. A stranger stood at the far end — Veyl the Deepforger, a name the ledgers never mentioned. He said nothing when Kael entered.

writer_request_meta.beatDescription: Kael arrives at the Broken Anchor and meets the innkeeper. No other new characters are authorized.

gold.notes: Veyl the Deepforger is NOT in allowed_new_entities (only Marra the Innkeeper is). The checker must flag Veyl as an unsanctioned new entity. Marra must NOT be flagged.
